remarks: Perched just under the top floor, this stunning 2BR/1BA condo offers breathtaking, unobstructed views of the Long Island Sound and downtown Stamford-an everyday backdrop that feels like a private retreat. The beautifully renovated kitchen features elegant light gray granite countertops, crisp white cabinetry, and stainless steel appliances, blending style and functionality. Sleek laminate flooring flows throughout, complemented by a tastefully updated bath. Start your mornings on the private balcony with coffee and a good book as the sun rises over the water, and wind down in the evening as the city lights shimmer in the distance. Enjoy resort-style living with an in-ground pool-perfect for summer days spent lounging, swimming, and relaxing-or take a short drive to Stamford's premier beaches. A playground is also located on the property. Heat, hot water, and cooking gas are all included in the common charges, adding exceptional value and convenience. Ideally located just minutes from top dining, nightlife, and attractions including Chelsea Piers, with easy access to I-95and Metro-North Railroad for a seamless commute. The community also offers 24-hour security for added peace of mind. A rare opportunity to own a move-in-ready condo with views, lifestyle, and location-don't miss it.
